title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Dulux Decorator Centre

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Dulux Decorator Centre
jsonLd.description:
We at Dulux Decorator Centre are looking for an experienced Visual Merchandiser based out of Vadodara. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Dulux Decorator Centre:
Dulux Decorator Centre is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dulux Decorator Centre!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
